title: Vector Representations Path
description: Build fluency in Vector Representations inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Word Embeddings
steps.summary: Dense vector representations of words, often used in natural language processing tasks. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Compare it with Word to Vector and Dense Embeddings. It opens into static word embeddings and dynamic word embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Vector DB Techniques
steps.summary: Vector DB Techniques belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Start after Vector DB. It opens into Vector DB Extensions Techniques and Vector DB Enhancements Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Vector DB Enhancements
steps.summary: Vector DB Enhancements belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Start after Vector DB. It opens into Vector DB Enhancements Techniques and Vector DB Enhancements Techniques Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Paragraph Vectors (Doc2Vec)
steps.summary: Paragraph Vectors (Doc2Vec) belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Start after Paragraph Vectors and Doc2Vec. It opens into Doc2Vec (Paragraph Vectors: PV-DM, PV-DBOW).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Azure Cognitive Search (vector)
steps.summary: Azure Cognitive Search (vector) belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Start after A* Search and A Search Algorithm*.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Doc2Vec (Paragraph Vectors: PV-DM, PV-DBOW)
steps.summary: Doc2Vec (Paragraph Vectors: PV-DM, PV-DBOW) belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Start after Paragraph Vectors (Doc2Vec) and Paragraph Vectors.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Embedding
steps.summary: Embedding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Compare it with Output Embedding and Word to Vector. It opens into Output Embedding and Embedding Bag.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Vector Space
steps.summary: Vector Space belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Vector Representations. It sits inside Representation Learning / Vector Representations. Compare it with Vector Space Models and Vector Space Model. It opens into vector space similarity and Euclidean Distance in Text Vector Space.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
